title: Fix Critical SEO & Accessibility Issues
problem: The landing page uses <h3> instead of <h1> for the hero heading, there's no proper heading hierarchy, and era-related keywords are missing from body text. The E2E audit scored only 66% (25/38 tests passing).
approach: 1) Change the hero heading from <h3> to <h1> in HeroGallery.tsx. 2) Audit all pages for proper heading hierarchy. 3) Add semantic HTML text content with target keywords. 4) Add aria-labels and alt text. 5) Implement JSON-LD for Product and FAQ schemas. 6) Fix the 10 SEO landing pages with unique meta descriptions.

title: Migrate API Keys from Client-Side to Edge Functions
problem: The .env file exposes VITE_GROQ_API_KEY and VITE_OPENAI_API_KEY as client-side environment variables (VITE_ prefix means bundled into browser JS). Critical security vulnerability.
approach: 1) Create Supabase Edge Functions as API proxies. 2) Move secret keys to server-side only. 3) Implement rate limiting in edge functions. 4) Remove VITE_ prefix keys from client code. 5) Update ai.ts to call edge functions.

title: Fix Authentication Memory Leaks and Race Conditions
problem: HIGH severity memory leak in ClerkAuthContext.tsx (useEffect lacks cleanup) and race conditions in user profile sync. Causes stale data and crashes.
approach: 1) Add AbortController to async operations. 2) Return proper cleanup from useEffect. 3) Add useRef flags to prevent state updates after unmount. 4) Add React Query caching for profile data. 5) Wrap context in useMemo.

title: Implement Proper Test Coverage (Currently <5%)
problem: Only a handful of test files exist despite 274 source files. Critical paths — auth, payment/webhooks, story generation, credit deduction — have zero test coverage.
approach: 1) Set up MSW for API mocking. 2) Write unit tests for credit deduction, billing calculations. 3) Write integration tests for auth lifecycle and payment flows.

title: Optimize Bundle Size (Currently 2.1MB+)
problem: The production bundle is 2.1MB+ (way above the 500KB target). Large dependencies: framer-motion (150KB), @hello-pangea/dnd (120KB), supabase-js (400KB). Slow load times hurt mobile teen users.
approach: 1) Analyze with bundle analyzer. 2) Implement code splitting with React.lazy(). 3) Replace framer-motion with CSS animations. 4) Lazy load Supabase client. 5) Tree-shake unused lodash functions.

title: Implement Offline Mode with Service Worker
problem: No service worker means no offline support. Teens often have spotty connectivity at school/venues. Can't generate stories without internet.
approach: 1) Add Vite PWA plugin with workbox. 2) Cache static assets and API responses. 3) Implement offline story queue (store locally, sync when online). 4) Add offline indicator UI.

title: Add Real-Time Collaboration Features
problem: The product is single-user focused. No way to share stories with friends or collaborate on era selections. Missed viral loop opportunity.
approach: 1) Add Supabase real-time subscriptions for story sharing. 2) Create share links with view-only access. 3) Add friend list and activity feed. 4) Implement collaborative era voting.

title: Fix Credit System Race Conditions
problem: Credit deduction happens client-side before API call. Users can manipulate this by intercepting requests. Also no idempotency key for story generation — double-clicking could double-charge.
approach: 1) Move credit deduction to server-side edge function. 2) Add database transaction with SELECT FOR UPDATE. 3) Add idempotency keys to story generation. 4) Implement credit balance verification before each generation.

title: Implement Proper Error Boundaries and Recovery
problem: No React error boundaries. A single component crash (e.g., malformed API response) takes down the entire app. No graceful degradation.
approach: 1) Add ErrorBoundary components around major sections. 2) Implement retry logic with exponential backoff. 3) Add fallback UI for failed components. 4) Log errors to Sentry/console.

title: Add Analytics and Funnel Tracking
problem: No proper analytics setup. Can't track conversion funnel: landing → signup → credit purchase → story generation. Missing data for growth optimization.
approach: 1) Add PostHog or Plausible for privacy-friendly analytics. 2) Track key events: pageview, signup, credit purchase, story generation. 3) Create dashboard for funnel visualization. 4) Set up conversion goals.
